mapper.select: select member_id, email, password_hash, name, nickname, phone, profile_image_url, bio, email_verified, phone_verified, role, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from members where email = #{email} limit 1

select member_id, email, password_hash, name, nickname, phone, profile_image_url, bio, email_verified, phone_verified, role, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from members where member_id = #{memberId} limit 1
mapper.update: update members set nickname = #{nickname}, bio = #{bio}, updated_at = now(6) where member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_tbl WHERE follower_member_id = #{followerId} AND following_member_id = #{followingId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follow_tbl (follower_member_id, following_member_id) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followingId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE created_at = now()
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM follow_tbl WHERE follower_member_id = #{followerId} AND following_member_id = #{followingId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_tbl WHERE following_member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_tbl WHERE follower_member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_tbl WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM saved_post WHERE member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT m.member_id as memberId, m.name, m.nickname, m.email, m.profile_image_url as profileImageUrl, CASE WHEN f2.follower_member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as isFollowing, CASE WHEN f3.follower_member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as followsMe FROM (SELECT * FROM follow_tbl WHERE following_member_id = #{targetId}) f JOIN members m ON f.follower_member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN follow_tbl f2 ON f2.follower_member_id = #{loginId} AND f2.following_member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN follow_tbl f3 ON f3.follower_member_id = m.member_id AND f3.following_member_id = #{loginId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC

SELECT m.member_id as memberId, m.name, m.nickname, m.email, m.profile_image_url as profileImageUrl, CASE WHEN f2.follower_member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as isFollowing, CASE WHEN f3.follower_member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as followsMe FROM (SELECT * FROM follow_tbl WHERE follower_member_id = #{targetId}) f JOIN members m ON f.following_member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN follow_tbl f2 ON f2.follower_member_id = #{loginId} AND f2.following_member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN follow_tbl f3 ON f3.follower_member_id = m.member_id AND f3.following_member_id = #{loginId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
